stemHtml: An aircraft is flying at 2000 ft overhead a VOR beacon which is 60 NM away from the destination aerodrome. The pilot wishes to monitor the ATIS of the destination aerodrome, but he is receiving a weak and distorted signal. In order to receive the ATIS, the pilot should...

options.a: increase the volume of the radio.
options.b: tune to the VOR beacon below as well, because two VHF signals will strengthen each other.
options.c: descend to a lower altitude, for example 1000 ft.
options.d: climb to a higher altitude, for example 3000 ft.
